title: Mildly Spicy Indian Rice Pilaf
description: A salty, comforting Indian dish featuring Vialone Nano rice, this pilaf is a jain-friendly option with a mildly spicy flavor.
instructions: Heat ghee in a large pan over medium heat.
Add cumin seeds and let them sizzle for a few seconds.
Add the chopped onion and grated ginger and saute until the onion is translucent.
Add the chopped green chili and saute for another minute.
Add the coriander powder, turmeric powder, and salt, and stir well.
Add the rinsed and drained Vialone Nano rice and stir to coat the rice with the spice mixture.
Add the water to the pan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the pan with a tight-fitting lid, and simmer for 15 minutes or until the water is absorbed and the rice is cooked.
Turn off the heat and let the pilaf rest for 5 minutes before serving.
